text:
SEX_CD 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 16 

SEX_CD 

LABEL: Sex 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the sex of the beneficiary. 

SHORT NAME: SEX_CD 

LONG NAME: SEX_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Aligned Beneficiary Pioneer ACO RIF 

VALUES: 1 = Male 
 2 = Female 

COMMENT: In 2025, this field was renamed to sex to comply with Executive Order 14168.
